onboard: Insert master (black) key into ignition and remove 5 times without turning, leaving in on 5th insertion. Open and close driver door 6 times within 30 seconds total. Remove master key — security light goes solid. Insert new key (do not turn); security light flashes ~60 s then extinguishes = programmed. Remove key, reinsert master, start/stop to confirm.
addKey: Perform on-board sequence above with one master key present. Up to 4 sub-keys can be added per session.
allKeysLost: On-board sequence requires at least one working master key. AKL: use programmer (T-Code, Autel IM608, or OBDSTAR) via OBDII; select Toyota 4C Type 1 AKL reset. No PIN required for 4C systems.
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, above accelerator pedal
securityWait: ~60 s during key registration (light flashes then off)
specialTool: T-Code or Autel IM608 for AKL; none for on-board add-key

onboard: Insert master (black) key into ignition and remove 5 times without turning, leaving in on 5th insertion. Open and close driver door 6 times within 30 seconds total. Remove master key — security light goes solid. Insert new key (do not turn); security light flashes ~60 s then extinguishes = programmed.
addKey: Perform on-board sequence above with one working master key. G/H OBDII dongle also supported for add-key with 1 working key.
allKeysLost: Standard OBDII dongle (G/H type) does NOT work AKL. AKL: use Autel IM608, T-Code, or OBDSTAR; select Toyota 4D67 Type 3 AKL reset via OBDII. No PIN required.
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, above accelerator pedal
specialTool: Autel IM608 / T-Code / OBDSTAR for AKL; Toyota G/H OBDII dongle or none for add-key

onboard: Insert master (black) key into ignition and remove 5 times without turning, leaving in on 5th insertion. Open and close driver door 6 times within 30 seconds total. Remove master key — security light goes solid. Insert new key (do not turn); security light flashes ~60 s then extinguishes = programmed.
addKey: On-board sequence with one working master key, or Toyota G/H OBDII dongle (add-key only, not AKL).
allKeysLost: G/H OBDII dongle does NOT work AKL. AKL: Autel IM608, Lonsdor K518, or AutoProPad via OBDII — select Toyota G-chip Type 3 AKL. No PIN required.
specialTool: Autel IM608 / Lonsdor K518 for AKL; Toyota G/H OBDII dongle for add-key

addKey: H chip (4D74) requires OBDII programmer — no on-board sequence supported. Use Toyota G/H OBDII dongle or Autel IM608: connect to OBDII port, select Toyota H-chip add key, insert original key to ON, follow prompts to register new key.
allKeysLost: H chip AKL: OBDSTAR X300 or Autel IM608 via OBDII. Navigate to Toyota > Type 3 (With H/8A/8E) > USA > Reset Immobilizer (All Keys Lost). Follow software prompts; toggle ignition on/off as directed. No PIN required.
specialTool: Toyota G/H OBDII dongle or Autel IM608 / OBDSTAR X300

addKey: No on-board programming. Professional OBDII programmer required. With one working smart key: connect Autel IM608 Pro or Lonsdor K518 to OBDII, navigate to Toyota Smart Key > Add Key, present new key to start button area when prompted.
allKeysLost: 8A DST-AES AKL: Lonsdor K518 + ADP adapter connects to PEPS smart box, backs up DFlash EEPROM data, generates emulator (LKE card), acquires 12-digit PIN from EEPROM data, then programs new smart keys. Autel IM608 Pro with APB112 emulator also supported. 12-digit code source: PEPS EEPROM (not OBD read direct, not VIN-based).
pinSource: EEPROM read via ADP adapter (PEPS smart box) or Autel APB112 emulator
specialTool: Autel IM608 Pro + APB112 emulator, or Lonsdor K518 + ADP adapter

onboard: Insert master (black) key into ignition and remove 5 times without turning, leaving in on 5th insertion. Open and close driver door 6 times within 30 seconds total. Remove master key — security light goes solid. Insert new key (do not turn); security light flashes ~60 s then extinguishes = programmed.
addKey: On-board sequence with one working master key, or Toyota G/H OBDII dongle (add-key only).
allKeysLost: G/H OBDII dongle does NOT work AKL. AKL: Autel IM608 or T-Code via OBDII — select Toyota 4D67 Type 3 AKL. No PIN required.
specialTool: Autel IM608 / T-Code for AKL; Toyota G/H OBDII dongle for add-key

onboard: Insert master (black) key into ignition and remove 5 times without turning, leaving in on 5th insertion. Open and close driver door 6 times within 30 seconds total. addKey: On-board sequence with one working master key, or Toyota G/H OBDII dongle (add-key only).
allKeysLost: G/H OBDII dongle does NOT work AKL. AKL: Autel IM608 or Lonsdor K518 via OBDII — select Toyota G-chip AKL. No PIN required.
specialTool: Autel IM608 / Lonsdor K518 for AKL; Toyota G/H OBDII dongle for add-key

addKey: H chip (4D74) — no on-board sequence. Use Toyota G/H OBDII dongle or Autel IM608: connect to OBDII, select H-chip add-key, turn original key to ON, follow prompts.
allKeysLost: H chip AKL: OBDSTAR X300 or Autel IM608 via OBDII. Navigate Toyota > Type 3 (H/8A/8E) > USA > Reset Immobilizer AKL. Toggle ignition per prompts. No PIN required.
specialTool: Toyota G/H OBDII dongle or Autel IM608 / OBDSTAR X300

addKey: 8A DST-AES smart key — no on-board programming. Connect Autel IM608 Pro or Lonsdor K518 to OBDII, navigate to Toyota Smart Key > Add Key, present new key to start button when prompted.
allKeysLost: 8A AKL: Lonsdor K518 + ADP adapter or Autel IM608 Pro + APB112 emulator. Backs up PEPS EEPROM, generates emulator, acquires 12-digit PIN from EEPROM, programs new keys.
pinSource: EEPROM read via ADP adapter (PEPS smart box) or Autel APB112 emulator
specialTool: Autel IM608 Pro + APB112, or Lonsdor K518 + ADP adapter

Remove master key — security light goes solid. Insert new key (do not turn); security light flashes ~60 s then extinguishes = programmed.
addKey: On-board sequence with one working master key, or Toyota G/H OBDII dongle (add-key only).
allKeysLost: G/H OBDII dongle does NOT work AKL. AKL: Autel IM608 or T-Code via OBDII — select Toyota 4D67 AKL. No PIN required.

addKey: 8A smart key (HYQ14FBA) — no on-board programming. Connect Autel IM608 / Lonsdor K518 to OBDII, navigate to Toyota Smart Key > Add Key, place new key near start button, follow prompts.
allKeysLost: 8A AKL (HYQ14FBA G-board): Lonsdor K518 + ADP adapter or Autel IM608 Pro + APB112 emulator. ADP adapter reads PEPS EEPROM to extract 12-digit PIN, generates LKE emulator key, then programs new smart keys by proximity. Alternatively Autel KM100 supports via OBD for some board variants.
pinSource: EEPROM read via ADP adapter (PEPS smart box) or Autel APB112 emulator
specialTool: Lonsdor K518 + ADP adapter, or Autel IM608 Pro + APB112 emulator

addKey: 8A DST-AES smart key — no on-board programming. Connect Autel IM608 Pro or Lonsdor K518 to OBDII, navigate Smart Key > Add Key, present new key to start button when prompted.

pinSource: EEPROM read via ADP adapter (PEPS smart box) or Autel APB112 emulator; some 2019-2022 variants PIN-free via Autel KM100 OBD method
specialTool: Lonsdor K518 + ADP adapter, or Autel IM608 Pro + APB112 emulator, or Autel KM100

addKey: Flip key with 4D67 chip — transponder programming requires OBDII programmer (T-Code, Autel IM608). Remote portion: use G/H OBDII dongle add-remote mode. On-board sequence not confirmed for flip key format.
allKeysLost: AKL: Autel IM608 or T-Code via OBDII — Toyota 4D67 AKL reset. No PIN required.
specialTool: T-Code or Autel IM608 for transponder AKL; G/H OBDII dongle for remote add

specialTool: Toyota G/H OBDII dongle for add-key; Autel IM608 / OBDSTAR for AKL

addKey: 4D69 smart key (MOZB31EG, silver logo) — NO self-programming available. Must use Toyota Techstream with Mini-VCI cable: navigate Body Electrical > Smart Key > Utility > New Remote > Key Code Registration. Car must have at least one working key and be in ACC mode.
allKeysLost: AKL: Toyota dealer or Techstream with TIS passcode. Technician connects Techstream, requests seed code, submits VIN + seed to TIS for passcode. Only certified dealer technicians can perform immobilizer reset. Professional locksmith tools (T-Code, Autel IM608) may support via OBD for this generation — confirm tool compatibility before attempting.
pinSource: dealer Techstream / Toyota TIS seed-PIN calculation
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, behind small panel
securityWait: 16 min if Techstream TIS reset required
specialTool: Toyota Techstream + Mini-VCI cable, or T-Code / Autel IM608 (confirm compatibility)

addKey: HYQ14ACX (4D67 GNE board 5290) smart key — no DIY on-board programming. OBDII programmer required. Autel IM608, Lonsdor K518, or Toyota G/H OBDII dongle can add key with one working key. Alternatively Techstream: Body Electrical > Smart Key > New Remote.
allKeysLost: AKL: Autel IM608 Pro (with APB112 emulator for 2010-2018 Prius AKL) or Toyota Techstream TIS passcode method (seed code + 16 min wait). Standard G/H OBDII dongle does NOT support AKL.
pinSource: OBD read via Autel APB112 emulator, or seed/PIN via Toyota TIS dealer Techstream
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, behind small panel
securityWait: 16 min if using Techstream TIS method
specialTool: Autel IM608 Pro + APB112 emulator, or Toyota Techstream + Mini-VCI; Toyota G/H OBDII dongle for add-key only

allKeysLost: 8A AKL: use programmer guided procedure — Lonsdor K518 + ADP adapter or Autel IM608 Pro + APB112 emulator. Confirm tool firmware supports HYQ14FLB (board 3950) before attempting.
pinSource: EEPROM read via ADP adapter (PEPS smart box) or Autel APB112 emulator
specialTool: Autel IM608 Pro + APB112, or Lonsdor K518 + ADP adapter; ABRITES for difficult cases

onboard: Insert master (black) key into ignition and remove 5 times without turning, leaving in on 5th insertion. Open and close driver door 6 times within 30 seconds total. Remove master key — security light goes solid. Insert new key (do not turn); security light flashes ~60 s then extinguishes = programmed.
addKey: On-board sequence with one working master key.
allKeysLost: AKL: Autel IM608 or T-Code via OBDII — Lexus/Toyota 4C AKL reset. No PIN required.
specialTool: T-Code or Autel IM608 for AKL; none for on-board add-key

addKey: 4D68 chip — no on-board sequence. Autel IM608 or T-Code via OBDII: select Lexus 4D68 Immobilizer, add key mode.
allKeysLost: 4D68 AKL: Autel KM100 or Autel IM608 via OBDII — Lexus > Immobilizer 4D67/68 > Quick Reset. No PIN required. EEPROM (93C56) method as fallback.
pinSource: OBD read (Autel KM100 / IM608 internally); EEPROM 93C56 as fallback
specialTool: Autel IM608 or Autel KM100; T-Code; EEPROM 93C56 as fallback

allKeysLost: 8A AKL: use programmer guided procedure — Lonsdor K518 + ADP adapter or Autel IM608 Pro + APB112 or ABRITES. Confirm firmware supports 2022+ NX (HYQ14FLC) before attempting.

addKey: HYQ14ACX (4D67 GNE board 5290) smart key — no DIY on-board programming. Autel IM608, Lonsdor K518, or Toyota G/H OBDII dongle can add key with one working key via OBDII.

securityWait: 16 min if using Techstream TIS method

onboard: G chip (2011-2013 TR47 keyway): Insert master key 5 times, door 6 times — standard sequence. H chip variant (TOY48 keyway, 2014-2015): no on-board programming.
addKey: G chip: on-board sequence or Toyota G/H OBDII dongle. H chip: Toyota G/H OBDII dongle or Autel IM608, add-key mode.
allKeysLost: G chip AKL: Autel IM608 or Lonsdor K518, G-chip AKL reset, no PIN. H chip AKL: OBDSTAR X300 or Autel IM608, Type 3 (H/8A/8E) USA AKL reset, no PIN.
specialTool: Toyota G/H OBDII dongle for add-key; Autel IM608 / OBDSTAR for AKL
